name: horo-medusa-backend
description: Medusa v2 backend for HORO (Railway + Postgres).
author: HORO

scripts.seed:egypt:public: sh -c 'if [ -n "$DATABASE_PUBLIC_URL" ]; then export DATABASE_URL="$DATABASE_PUBLIC_URL"; fi; exec medusa exec ./src/scripts/seed-egypt-catalog.ts'
scripts.ensure:egypt-payment-providers:public: sh -c 'if [ -n "$DATABASE_PUBLIC_URL" ]; then export DATABASE_URL="$DATABASE_PUBLIC_URL"; fi; exec medusa exec ./src/scripts/ensure-egypt-payment-providers.ts'
scripts.rewrite:store-media-urls:public: sh -c 'if [ -n "$DATABASE_PUBLIC_URL" ]; then export DATABASE_URL="$DATABASE_PUBLIC_URL"; fi; exec medusa exec ./src/scripts/rewrite-storage-urls-to-store-media.ts'
scripts.seed:demo-categories:public: sh -c 'if [ -n "$DATABASE_PUBLIC_URL" ]; then export DATABASE_URL="$DATABASE_PUBLIC_URL"; fi; exec medusa exec ./src/scripts/ensure-demo-product-categories.ts'
scripts.dump:categories:public: sh -c 'if [ -n "$DATABASE_PUBLIC_URL" ]; then export DATABASE_URL="$DATABASE_PUBLIC_URL"; fi; exec medusa exec ./src/scripts/dump-product-categories.ts'
scripts.inspect:product-pdp:public: sh -c 'if [ -n "$DATABASE_PUBLIC_URL" ]; then export DATABASE_URL="$DATABASE_PUBLIC_URL"; fi; exec medusa exec ./src/scripts/print-product-pdp-fields.ts'
scripts.clear:product-occasion-slug:public: sh -c 'if [ -n "$DATABASE_PUBLIC_URL" ]; then export DATABASE_URL="$DATABASE_PUBLIC_URL"; fi; exec medusa exec ./src/scripts/clear-product-occasion-slug.ts'
scripts.backfill:product-artist-metadata:public: sh -c 'if [ -n "$DATABASE_PUBLIC_URL" ]; then export DATABASE_URL="$DATABASE_PUBLIC_URL"; fi; exec medusa exec ./src/scripts/backfill-product-artist-metadata.ts'
scripts.migrate:feelings-categories:public: sh -c 'if [ -n "$DATABASE_PUBLIC_URL" ]; then export DATABASE_URL="$DATABASE_PUBLIC_URL"; fi; exec medusa exec ./src/scripts/migrate-feelings-to-product-categories.ts'
scripts.audit:feelings-categories:public: sh -c 'if [ -n "$DATABASE_PUBLIC_URL" ]; then export DATABASE_URL="$DATABASE_PUBLIC_URL"; fi; exec medusa exec ./src/scripts/audit-feeling-category-assignments.ts'
scripts.seed:horo-taxonomy:public: sh -c 'if [ -n "$DATABASE_PUBLIC_URL" ]; then export DATABASE_URL="$DATABASE_PUBLIC_URL"; fi; exec medusa exec ./src/scripts/ensure-horo-taxonomy-product-categories.ts'
scripts.remove:legacy-taxonomy-feelings:public: sh -c 'if [ -n "$DATABASE_PUBLIC_URL" ]; then export DATABASE_URL="$DATABASE_PUBLIC_URL"; fi; exec medusa exec ./src/scripts/remove-legacy-taxonomy-feelings-category.ts'
scripts.parity:snapshot:remote: sh -c 'mkdir -p .parity && if [ -n "$DATABASE_PUBLIC_URL" ]; then export DATABASE_URL="$DATABASE_PUBLIC_URL"; fi; PARITY_OUTPUT_FILE=.parity/railway.json medusa exec ./src/scripts/parity-snapshot.ts'
